dataset: Real Yahoo Finance market data (OHLCV format)

pi_items.source: Web search verification + local data files. SPY is SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. AAPL is Apple Inc. MSFT is Microsoft Corporation. Real market data files exist at /workspace/data/SPY.Last.txt, /workspace/data/AAPL.Last.txt, /workspace/data/MSFT.Last.txt

Microsoft Learn official documentation for System.Windows.Media.Brushes. All colors exist with hexadecimal values: Green=#FF008000, Lime=#FF00FF00, LightGreen=#FF90EE90, DarkGreen=#FF006400, SeaGreen=#FF2E8B57, PaleGreen=#FF98FB98

Microsoft Learn official documentation for System.Windows.Media.Brushes. All colors exist with hexadecimal values: Red=#FFFF0000, Pink=#FFFFC0CB, LightPink=#FFFFB6C1, DarkRed=#FF8B0000, Crimson=#FFDC143C, IndianRed=#FFCD5C5C
Task description requirement (section 6: 'Save the workspace as HeatmapTask')
NinjaTrader 8 standard Market Analyzer column name for 'Net Change %'. This is a built-in column in NinjaTrader platform.
Task description requirement (section 5: 'Sort the grid by Net Change % in Descending order (winners on top)')

pi_items.verified_value: OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) semicolon-delimited format
pi_items.source: Direct inspection of /workspace/data/*.Last.txt files. Format: YYYYMMDD;Open;High;Low;Close;Volume. Data spans from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31 (503 trading days).

pi_items.verified_value: Real historical market data from January 2023 to December 2024
pi_items.source: Data file inspection confirms real market prices. SPY, AAPL, MSFT are actual publicly traded securities with corresponding real price history. Files exist: SPY.Last.txt (23,144 bytes), AAPL.Last.txt (23,115 bytes), MSFT.Last.txt (23,089 bytes)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real financial data from Yahoo Finance for three major publicly traded securities: SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF), AAPL (Apple Inc.), and MSFT (Microsoft Corporation). Market data spans 2023-2024 in OHLCV format. All color names specified (Green, Lime, LightGreen, DarkGreen, SeaGreen, PaleGreen, Red, Pink, LightPink, DarkRed, Crimson, IndianRed) are valid System.Windows.Media.Brushes colors used by NinjaTrader 8. Task requires configuring a Market Analyzer window to display these instruments with conditional cell coloring based on Net Change % values.
